_comment: EXAMPLE / TEMPLATE — a NON-doc task (a restaurant menu). #12 asks for at least one doc and one non-doc spec. Repoint url at a real menu and verify every expect[] value before trusting the score. See ../README.md.
name: pizzeria-menu
task: Extract the full food menu with dishes and prices

expect._revealNote: Menu categories are often behind tabs/accordions (Pizzas / Pasta / Drinks) — list an item that is hidden until you open its category.
expect._includeNote: Dishes/prices the task asked for — these must survive.
expect._excludeNote: Off-task chrome a menu task should NOT keep.
